title: All Purpose White Undercoat 400ML - Professional Satin Finish Spray Wood Color Paint
features: Apply to wood, metal, plastic and more
Quick drying and effective for interior and exterior application
Leaves a fantastic finish on most surfaces
description: This Paint Factory product is an all purpose white spray paint, quick drying high performance matt primer. Suitable for interior & exterior applicaton. For use on metal, plastic & wood. This products leaves a great finish on most surfaces. DESCRIPTION Paint Factory All Purpose White Matt 400ml is a versatile and high-quality paint that provides a smooth and even coverage for various surfaces. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, its matte finish adds a sleek and modern touch to any painting project. Easy to apply with its user-friendly spray mechanism, this all-purpose paint dries quickly and adheres well to metal, wood, and other materials. Its durability ensures long-lasting results, maintaining the beauty of your painted surfaces for years. BENEFITS Provides smooth, flawless matte finish Applies easily with spray nozzle Quick-drying formula Suitable for multiple surfaces Durable and long-lasting DIRECTIONS Shake well before use. Apply evenly in a sweeping motion. USE : There is a safety lock below the nozzle which needs to be removed before using the spray. Once removed the spray should work. For more information, please check the back of the can
